---
title: "Webinars"
---

EnviBayes has run a **monthly Zoom series** with research talks, tutorials, and related sessions—see announcements and past posts (e.g. Haavard Rue, October 2022; career panels; NIMBLE tutorial) on the [ISBA EnviBayes section page under Events / News](https://bayesian.org/sectionschapters/environmental-sciences/).

For the latest schedule and how to join, rely on updates posted there or circulated through ISBA section channels.
